search.query: | ```basic validation of lookup ``` savedsearch idp_validation lookup_name=$lookup_name$

condition.set: Lookup Validation Failed. Model processing stopped:

search.query: | ``` templates lookup for inputs ``` inputlookup itsi_service_template_sync_status_lookup | dedup _key | fields _key, title | eval id=_key
| savedsearch idp_base_v2 lookup=$lookup_name$ lob=$lob|s$ group=$group|s$ tier_1=$tier_1|s$ tier_2=$tier_2|s$ tier_3=$tier_3|s$
| search template_name=* | fields template_name | stats values(template_name) as filter | eval filter=mvjoin(filter, "|")

| appendpipe [ | where isnotnull(child) | rename child as parent ] | eval regexstr=replace(parent,"[\[\(\)\]\s]",".") | stats values(eval(case(isnotnull(template_name),regexstr))) as regexentityfilter, values(regexstr) as regexsvcfilter, values(parent) as origsvcfilter | foreach *filter [ eval <<FIELD>>=mvjoin(<<FIELD>>, "|") ]

| rest report_as=text splunk_server=local /servicesNS/nobody/SA-ITOA/itoa_interface/base_service_template filter="{\"title\": {\"$regex\" : \"^($template_filter_regex$)$\" }}" fields="entity_rules,title" | eval foundcount=mvcount(json_array_to_mv(value)), inputtemplatecount=mvcount(split("$template_filter_regex$","|")), checkresult=if(foundcount==inputtemplatecount, null(), printf("Failed to create Template Filter. Found %s of %s expected template in ITSI.",foundcount,inputtemplatecount)), value=if(isnull(checkresult), value, null()) | appendpipe [| where isnotnull(value) ``` given we have all expected templates, start processing entity rules ``` | fields value | eval value=json_array_to_mv(value) | mvexpand value | eval title=json_extract(value,"title"), id=json_extract(value,"_key"), rules=json_extract(value,"entity_rules{}") | fields - value | mvexpand rules | streamstats c by title | eval key=title.c, item=json_extract(rules, "{}.rule_items") | mvexpand item | foreach field field_type value rule_type [ eval <<FIELD>>=spath(item, "<<FIELD>>")] | eval new_item=case(rule_type=="matchesblank", json_object("field", field, "field_type", field_type, "value", field, "rule_type", "matchesblank"), rule_type=="notmatchesblank", json_object("field", field, "field_type", field_type, "value", field, "rule_type", "notmatchesblank"), 1==1, item) | stats values(new_item) as item by key, title | eval new_rules=json_object("rule_condition", "AND", "rule_items", json(printf("[%s]", mvjoin(item, ",")))) | eval f=json_object("rule_items", json(printf("[%s]", mvjoin(item, ","))), "rule_condition", "AND") | stats values(f) as filter by title | eval serviceTemplatesConfig=printf("\"%s\": %s", title, json_object("entity_rules", json(printf("[%s]", mvjoin(filter, ","))))) | stats values(serviceTemplatesConfig) as serviceTemplatesConfig | eval serviceTemplatesConfig=printf("\"{%s}\"", replace(mvjoin(serviceTemplatesConfig, ","), "\"", "\\\"")) ] | fields checkresult, serviceTemplatesConfig | search checkresult=* OR serviceTemplatesConfig=*

condition.set: Failed to create Template Filter, set_template_filter returned no results.

``` Generates the selected services ``` savedsearch idp_base_v2 lookup=$lookup_name$ group=$group|s$ lob=$lob|s$ tier_1=$tier_1|s$ tier_2=$tier_2|s$ tier_3=$tier_3|s$ $comment$ | itsiimportobjects serviceTagsFields="tag1,tag2,tag3,tag4,tag5,tag6,tag7" serviceEnabled="1" serviceTitleField=parent serviceDependentsFields=child serviceTemplateField="template_name" serviceTemplatesConfig=$result.serviceTemplatesConfig$ updateType=$updateType$ $comment$

search.query: | rest /services/data/lookup-table-files | search title=idp*services*.csv | fields title
| inputlookup $lookup_name$ | stats c by group
| inputlookup $lookup_name$ where group=$group|s$ | stats c by lob
| inputlookup $lookup_name$ where lob=$lob|s$ AND group=$group|s$ | dedup t1
| inputlookup $lookup_name$ where lob=$lob|s$ AND group=$group|s$ AND t1=$tier_1|s$ | dedup t2
| inputlookup $lookup_name$ where lob=$lob|s$ AND group=$group|s$ AND t1=$tier_1|s$ AND t2=$tier_2|s$ | dedup t3

panel.title: Tier to Field Mapping - Mapping example from $lookup_name$

search.query: | ```show tier to field mapping using example data from lookup ``` inputlookup $lookup_name$ where lob=$lob|s$ group=$group|s$ t1=$tier_1|s$ | fields t1, t2, t3 | eval tiers=case(len(t1)>0 AND len(t2)>0 AND len(t3)>0, mvappend(t1,t2,t3), len(t1)>0 AND len(t2)>0, mvappend(t1,t2), len(t1)>0, t1), max=mvcount(tiers) | sort - max | head 1 | fields - max tiers | fillnull value="-" | transpose column_name="tier" | rename "row 1" as sample | append [ | inputlookup idp_tierfield_mapping.csv | transpose column_name="field" | rename "row 1" as tier | fillnull value="zzz" tier ] | stats values(field) as field, values(sample) as sample by tier | fillnull value="zzz" field | foreach tier, field [ eval <<FIELD>>=if(<<FIELD>>=="zzz", "no mapping", <<FIELD>>) ] | rename sample as "lookup sample value", field as "idp field" | table tier, "lookup sample value", "idp field"

condition.set: makeresults | eval msg="Pick an action to run it"

``` Generates CURL that clones the service template with the given id ``` makeresults | eval template_name=split("$template_filter_regex$","|") | mvexpand template_name | lookup itsi_service_template_sync_status_lookup title as template_name OUTPUT _key as key_found | search NOT template_name IN ($template_clone_id|s$,$p1_template_clone_id|s$,$p2_template_clone_id|s$,$p3_template_clone_id|s$) | dedup template_name | eval defaulttmplt="$template_clone_id$",p1tmplt="$p1_template_clone_id$",p2tmplt="$p2_template_clone_id$",p3tmplt="$p3_template_clone_id$", template2clone=case(isnull(key_found) AND match(template_name,"_P1$"), p1tmplt, isnull(key_found) AND match(template_name,"_P2$"), p2tmplt, isnull(key_found) AND match(template_name,"_P3$"), p3tmplt, isnull(key_found), defaulttmplt), curl_to_run=if(isnull(key_found), printf("%s 'https://%s/servicesNS/nobody/SA-ITOA/itoa_interface/base_service_template' -H \"Content-Type:application/json\" -X POST -d '{\"title\": \"%s\",\"_key\": \"__%s__\",\"base_service_template_id\": \"%s\"}';", "$curl_cmd$", "$itsi_uri$", template_name, lower(replace(template_name, "[\s\-\.]+", "_")), template2clone), null()) | stats values(eval(case(isnotnull(key_found),template_name))) as "Existing Templates Identified", values(eval(case(isnull(key_found),template_name))) as "Templates to Create", values(curl_to_run) as "Template creation CURL commands to execute:" | fillnull value="none" "Existing Templates Identified" "Templates to Create" "Template creation CURL commands to execute:"

``` Generated payload to set the KPI urgency for the named services ``` `itoa_rest("service", "title", "^($service_filter_regex$)$", "_key,title,services_depends_on,service_tags")` | eval urg_tag=coalesce(spath(value, "service_tags.tags{}"), "") | mvexpand urg_tag | search urg_tag=urg:* | rex field=urg_tag "^urg:(?<child>.+):(?<urgency>\d+)$" | join child [| inputlookup service_kpi_lookup | eval child=lower(title), child_id=_key | fields child, child_id ] | eval link=spath(value, "services_depends_on{}") | mvexpand link | where child_id=spath(link, "serviceid") | eval link=json_set(link, "overloaded_urgencies", json_object("SHKPI-".child_id, urgency)) | fields - value, splunk_server urg_tag | stats values(link) as link by id, title | eval payload=json_object("_key", id, "title", title, "services_depends_on", json(printf("[%s]", mvjoin(link, ",")))) `get_payload` | eval curl=printf("%s 'https://%s/servicesNS/nobody/SA-ITOA/itoa_interface/service/bulk_update?is_partial_data=1' -H \"Content-Type:application/json\" -X POST -d '%s';", "$curl_cmd$", "$itsi_uri$", payload) | fields curl | appendpipe [ | stats c | where c==0 | eval curl=case(isnull(value) OR len(value)<1, "No inscope services found, check success of 3. Build Model (import objects)") ] | rename curl as "Service urgency update CURL commands to execute:"

``` Generates the entities for the selected applications services``` savedsearch idp_base_v2 lookup=$lookup_name$ group=$group|s$ lob=$lob|s$ tier_1=$tier_1|s$ tier_2=$tier_2|s$ tier_3=$tier_3|s$ | where isnotnull(template_name) | dedup system_app | fields system_app,group,lob,system,app,function,type_name $comment$ | itsiimportobjects entityFieldMapping="" entityIdentifierFields="system_app" entityInformationalFields="group,lob,system,app,function,type_name,node_type" entityMergeField="system_app" entityTitleField="system_app" entityTypeField="Service Entity" updateType=$updateType$ $comment$

makeresults | eval host="$itsi_uri$", crl="$curl_cmd$", templatelist=split("$template_filter_regex$","|") ``` process templates - validate they exist and exclude templates synced with services outside the tree selected fro clean-up``` | mvexpand templatelist | where !match(templatelist,"(i-am-groot|we-are-groot)") | lookup itsi_service_template_sync_status_lookup title as templatelist OUTPUT _key as key_found | lookup service_telemetry_lookup base_service_template_id as key_found OUTPUT title | eval othersvcfound=mvmap(title,if(!match(title,"^($service_filter_regex$)$"), "true", null())) | search NOT othersvcfound=* | stats c(eval(isnotnull(templateid))) as templatecount values(host) as host values(crl) as crl values(key_found) as templateid | eval template_filter_regex=mvjoin(templateid,"|"), templatecmd=if(mvcount(split(template_filter_regex,"|"))>0, printf("%s 'https://%s/servicesNS/nobody/SA-ITOA/itoa_interface/base_service_template?filter=\{\"_key\":\{\"$regex\":\"^(%s)$\"\}\}' -X GET;", crl, host, template_filter_regex), "No templates qualify for deletion") | fields - templateid, template_filter_regex ``` end templates ``` ``` process services - exclude services that have children outside the tree selected for clean-up ``` | eval title=split("$service_filter$","|") | eval services=title | mvexpand title | lookup service_kpi_lookup title OUTPUT _key as serviceid | append [ | inputlookup service_telemetry_lookup | eval serviceid=_key | fields title, serviceid, services_depends_on.serviceid | rename services_depends_on.serviceid as children | search children=* ] | stats c values(*) as * by serviceid | search title=* services=* | lookup service_kpi_lookup _key as children OUTPUT title as childnames | foreach childnames mode=multivalue [ eval pattern=printf("^%s$", replace(<<ITEM>>,"[\(\)]",".")), othersfound=if(isnull(mvfind(services,pattern)), "othersfound", othersfound) ] | fields - pattern | eventstats values(eval(case(isnotnull(othersfound),title))) as excluded | foreach excluded mode=multivalue [ eval pattern=printf("^%s$", replace(<<ITEM>>,"[\(\)]",".")), othersfound=if(isnotnull(mvfind(childnames,pattern)), "othersfound", othersfound) ] ``` end services ``` ``` finalise and process entities - all leaf node services entities are inscope ``` | eval title=replace(title,"[\[\(\)\]\s]",".") | stats values(eval(case(isnull(othersfound),title))) as services, values(host) as host, values(crl) as crl, values(templatecmd) as templatecmd | eval servicecmd=if(mvcount(services)>0, printf("%s 'https://%s/servicesNS/nobody/SA-ITOA/itoa_interface/service?filter=\{\"title\":\{\"$regex\":\"^(%s)$\"\}\}' -X GET;", crl, host, mvjoin(services,"|")), "No services found in config"), entitycmd=if(mvcount(split("$entity_filter_regex$","|"))>0, printf("%s 'https://%s/servicesNS/nobody/SA-ITOA/itoa_interface/entity?filter=\{\"title\":\{\"$regex\":\"^($entity_filter_regex$)$\"\}\}' -X GET;", crl, host), "No entities found in config"), EXECUTE_WITH_CARE=printf("WARNING: Execute these commands with care. By default each command performs a GET, check the output and double check your ITSI backup before proceeding. Once the scope of the command is confirmed replace the -X GET with -X DELETE and execute:
%s %s %s
", entitycmd, servicecmd, templatecmd) | table EXECUTE_WITH_CARE

search.query: | table title, id
| table title, id
| table title, id
| table title, id

html.div:
WARNING!
$template_filter_config_error$
Cannot complete action "3. Build Model" without valid template configuration. Ensure action "1. Create Templates (curl)" completed successfully before continuing

div.b: Review Tokens to ensure correct values are set as expected, use disable import to validate without running any breaking updates.
For Template Filter Config ensure it contains all expected templates or services will not generate with correct entity filters.

panel.title: Actions Panel for generating various bits of config

search.query: | $action_body$

viz.title: Service Tree - select a node to view both proposed and existing config

search.query: | where isnotnull(child) | dedup parent child | table parent, child

| search parent="$clicked$" OR child="$clicked$" | fillnull value="None" child template_name | dedup child, parent, tier | stats values(eval(case(child!="$clicked$", child))) as children, values(eval(case(child=="$clicked$", parent))) as parent, values(eval(if(child=="$clicked$",urgency, null()))) as urgency, values(eval(case(parent=="$clicked$",template_name))) as template_name, values(tag1) as tag1, values(tag2) as tag2, values(tag3) as tag3, values(tag4) as tag4, values(tag5) as tag5, values(eval(case(parent=="$clicked$", tag6))) as tag6, values(eval(case(parent=="$clicked$", tag7))) as tag7, values(eval(case(parent=="$clicked$", node_type))) as node_type, values(eval(case(parent=="$clicked$", site))) as site | eval title="$clicked$", tags=mvappend(tag1, tag2, tag3, tag4, tag5, tag6), fields=mvmap(tags,printf("%-11s%s", printf("%s:",mvindex(split(tags,":"),0)), mvindex(split(tags,":"),1))), fields=if(isnotnull(site), mvappend(fields,printf("site: %s",site)), fields), fields=mvappend(fields,printf("node_type: %s",node_type)), fields=mvappend(fields,printf("urgency: %s",urgency)), tags=mvappend(tags,tag7) | fields title template_name parent children fields tags | transpose | rename "row 1" as value

table.title: Existing Service Config - if it exists

search.query: | rest report_as=text splunk_server=local /servicesNS/nobody/SA-ITOA/itoa_interface/service filter="{\"title\": \"$clicked$\"}" fields="title,_key,base_service_template_id,entity_rules,service_tags,services_depends_on" | eval value=spath(value, "{}") | mvexpand value | eval "title"=spath(value, "title"), "service_id"=spath(value, "_key") | eval template_id=coalesce(spath(value, "base_service_template_id"), "n/a") | eval er=coalesce(spath(value, "entity_rules{}"), "n/a") | eval dependecies=spath(value, "services_depends_on{}") | mvexpand dependecies | eval child=spath(dependecies, "overloaded_urgencies") | rex field=child "\"(?<child>[^\"]+)\"[:\s]+(?<urgency>\d+)" | appendpipe [| where isnull(child)|eval child=spath(dependecies, "serviceid") | lookup service_kpi_lookup _key as child OUTPUT title as child | eval c2=child."::11 (Default)"] | lookup service_kpi_lookup kpis._key as child OUTPUT title as child | eval children=coalesce(child."::".urgency, c2) | eval "tags"=spath(value, "service_tags.tags{}") | lookup itsi_service_template_sync_status_lookup _key as template_id OUTPUT title as template_name | fields title service_id template* er tags children | mvexpand er | eval entity_rule_items=spath(er, "rule_items{}") | mvexpand entity_rule_items | eval entity_rules=printf("%s:%s %s %s", upper(spath(entity_rule_items, "field_type")), spath(entity_rule_items, "field"), case(spath(entity_rule_items, "rule_type")=="matches", "==", spath(entity_rule_items, "rule_type")=="notmatches", "!=", 1==1, upper(spath(entity_rule_items, "rule_type"))), spath(entity_rule_items, "value")) | stats values(*) as * by title service_id er | fields - er* | eval entity_rules=printf("------ %s ------", mvjoin(entity_rules, " ")) | stats values(*) as * by title service_id | table title service_id template* * | transpose | rename "row 1" as value | appendpipe [ | stats count | where count=0 | eval column="No Service called '$clicked$' found" | table column]
